query: sodium vapor street light orange yellow night photograph
message: anti-aesthetic / color_and_tone / sickly_cast — sodium vapor street light cast, orange/yellow night tint

response.objective_caption: A nighttime view from a balcony overlooking a residential street during twilight. The curved corner of a multi-story apartment building occupies the left foreground, with sections of exterior paint missing from the facade. Below, a sidewalk and street run alongside a row of leafy trees that appear as dark shapes against the glow of streetlights. The warm orange light illuminates the pavement and lower portions of the trees. A car is parked along the curb. In the background, a large rectangular apartment building with several lit windows stands against a deep blue sky.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A nighttime view from a balcony overlooking a residential street during twilight. The curved corner of a multi-story apartment building occupies the left foreground, its facade showing significant paint loss and surface degradation. Below, a sidewalk and street run alongside a row of leafy trees silhouetted against a harsh sodium-vapor orange glow from the streetlights, which suffuses the pavement and foliage with a sickly, unhealthy tint. A car is parked along the curb. In the background, a large rectangular apartment building with several lit windows stands against a deep blue sky.
